    refine ⟨h_prog, ?_⟩
    simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm, Y] using hDY.2

  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖

          stoppedValue X τ.1) 1 P := hD'.2

    have hUIY' : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := hY_iff.mp hY_classD

    have hD_Y : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P := (hY_iff.mpr hUIY)
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩

        (fun (τ : {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤}) =>
          stoppedValue (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) τ.1) 1 P := hD_Y.2

      simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm, Y] using hUI
    have hD' : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := (hY_iff.mpr hUI')

by
  let Y : ι → Ω → E := fun t ω ↦ X t ω + 1
  have hY1 : Martingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.add martingale_const
  have hY2 : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω t ↦ (hX2 ω t).add continuous_const
  have hY3 : 0 ≤ Y := fun t ω ↦ by simpa [Y] using (add_le_add_left (zero_le_one : (0 : E) ≤ 1) _)
  have hY_eq : (fun ω ↦ Y (default : ι) ω) = fun ω ↦ X (default : ι) ω + 1 := rfl
  have hY_sub : Submartingale (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
    hY1.submartingale_convex_comp (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
      (fun t ↦ (hY1.integrable t).norm)
  have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (fun t ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) := fun ω t ↦ (hY2 ω t).norm
  have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) := fun t ω ↦ norm_nonneg _
  have hY_UI_iff : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 𝓕 P ↔ UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 1 P :=
    MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_sub hY_cont hY_nonneg
  have hUI_norm : UniformIntegrable X 1 P ↔ UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 1 P := by
    simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] using (Iff.rfl : UniformIntegrable X 1 P ↔ _)
  have hUI_normY : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P ↔ UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 1 P := by
    simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] using (Iff.rfl : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P ↔ _)
  have hD_normY : ClassD Y 𝓕 P ↔ UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := by
    constructor
    · intro hD
      have hD' : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 𝓕 P := by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · exact (hY1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hY2).norm
        · simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] using hD.uniformIntegrable.norm
      exact (hUI_normY.mp (hY_UI_iff.mp hD'))
    · intro hUI
      have hUI' : UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 1 P := hUI_normY.mp hUI
      have hD' : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖) 𝓕 P := hY_UI_iff.mpr hUI'
      refine ⟨hY1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hY2, ?_⟩
      simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] using hD'.uniformIntegrable
  constructor
  · intro hD
    have hD_Y : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := by
      refine ⟨hY1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hY2, ?_⟩
      simpa [Y] using hD.uniformIntegrable.add uniformIntegrable_const
    have hUI_Y : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := (hD_normY.mp hD_Y)
    simpa [Y] using hUI_Y.sub uniformIntegrable_const
  · intro hUI
    have hUI_Y : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := by
      simpa [Y] using hUI.add uniformIntegrable_const
    have hD_Y : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := (hD_normY.mpr hUI_Y)
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
    simpa [Y] using hD_Y.uniformIntegrable.sub uniformIntegrable_const

by
  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
  have hY_mart : Martingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.norm
  have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω t ↦ (hX2 ω t).norm
  constructor
  · intro hD
    have hDY : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := by
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · exact hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2 |>.norm
      · have hUI := hD.uniformIntegrable
        have hsimp :
            (fun τ :
                {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} =>
                stoppedValue Y τ.1)
              =
            (fun τ :
                {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} =>
                fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X τ.1 ω‖) := by
          funext τ; ext ω; simp [Y, stoppedValue]
        simpa [hsimp] using hUI.norm
    have : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := (hY_mart.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_cont).1 hDY
    simpa [Y] using this
  · intro hUI
    have hUIY : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := by
      simpa [Y] using hUI.norm
    have hDY : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := (hY_mart.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_cont).2 hUIY
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
    have hUIY_stop := hDY.uniformIntegrable
    have hsimp :
        (fun τ :
            {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} =>
            fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X τ.1 ω‖)
          =
        (fun τ :
            {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} =>
            stoppedValue Y τ.1) := by
      funext τ; ext ω; simp [Y, stoppedValue]
    simpa [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm, hsimp] using hUIY_stop

by simpa [Y] using hUI.norm
    have hDY : ClassD Y 𝓕 P :=
      (MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable (X := Y) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P)
        hY_sub hY_cont hY_nonneg).2 hUIY
    refine ⟨h_prog, ?_⟩
    simpa [ClassD] using (hDY.uniformIntegrable.comp
      (fun (T : {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤}) =>
        ⟨stoppedValue X T.1, by
          intro ω
          simp [Y]⟩)⟩
